cases.prompt: Show me the details for activity 123456, including intervals and gear if available.
cases.notes: Confusable read case: details for one known activity should route to get_activity_details before streams or lists.

cases.prompt: List all my activities from 2025-06-01 through 2025-11-30 so I can review that historical block.
cases.notes: Historical activity-window listing should use get_activities with its start/end filters; no separate date-window activity tool is required, and get_activity_details is only for one known activity id while get_training_summary/analyzers aggregate or compute rather than list activities.

cases.prompt: Show me all my run activities from June 1 2025 to November 30 2025, including dates and distances.
cases.notes: Sport/type-filtered historical windows are activity-index reads handled by get_activities; do not invent a date-window-specific tool, choose get_activity_details without an id, summarize with get_training_summary, or start with analyzer tools.

cases.prompt: Find the oldest cycling activity I logged between 2024-01-01 and 2024-03-31 before pulling any detailed activity data.
cases.notes: Oldest-in-period wording still starts with the activity index via get_activities date and sport/type filters; get_activity_details can follow after an id is selected, while get_training_summary and analyzer tools are not first-call list/discovery tools.

cases.prompt: For activity 123456, compute the average power and heart-rate for the segment from 00:10:00 to 00:25:00.
cases.notes: Analyzer helper should be selected instead of fetching raw streams into chat.

cases.prompt: Add a planned bike workout called Endurance 60 on 2026-06-01 with a one hour endurance description.
cases.notes: Write/update event routing should use the event upsert tool.

cases.prompt: Create a retry-safe planned Ride workout on 2026-06-01 named Endurance 60 using external_id icuvisor-manual-20260601-endurance.
cases.notes: Explicit external_id/idempotency intent is still a calendar event upsert, not a delete or custom-item write.

cases.prompt: Create an A race on 2026-09-13 called City Championship with a 40 km road race goal note.
cases.notes: Race creation is a calendar event write; use add_or_update_event with category RACE_A, not a separate add_race_event tool. No separate add_race_event tool is required or exposed.

cases.prompt: Add a B priority gravel race to my calendar for 2026-08-22 named Ridge Gravel, with expected duration around five hours.
cases.notes: B-race scheduling should route to the generic event upsert tool using category RACE_B; do not require a dedicated add_race_event tool.

cases.prompt: Put a C race tune-up 10K run called Riverside Tune Up on 2026-07-05 on my intervals calendar.
cases.notes: C-race prompts are event writes and should use add_or_update_event with category RACE_C; add_race_event should not be invented.

cases.prompt: Delete the calendar event evt-789 from my intervals.icu calendar.
cases.notes: Safe delete mode must not expose delete_event; the discoverability tool is acceptable because it explains the server-side ICUVISOR_DELETE_MODE=full gate without offering a model-controlled workaround.

cases.prompt: Delete the calendar event evt-789 from my intervals.icu calendar.
cases.notes: Same destructive intent should route to delete_event when delete tools are registered.

cases.prompt: Find workouts in my workout library folder with folder_id folder-base-plans.
cases.notes: Workout-library read case with a known folder_id should use the folder-specific listing; folder-name lookup belongs to get_workout_library first.

cases.prompt: Create a reusable Ride workout template named Easy Spin in workout-library folder folder-build-1 with description '60m easy aerobic endurance; synthetic routing eval'.
cases.notes: Full toolset write case for workout-library CRUD with required sport and folder_id present; natural-language workout-structure prompts may reasonably validate_workout first.

cases.prompt: Was my training distribution polarized or threshold-heavy from 2026-04-01 through 2026-05-27?
cases.notes: Analyzer helper should handle training-distribution classification when concrete athlete-local dates are already supplied; relative-date prompts may reasonably resolve dates first.

cases.prompt: Give me a season planning overview for the next 20 weeks: current phase, key build blocks, recovery weeks, taper context, and weekly load targets if they exist.
cases.notes: ATP positive: season phase, recovery weeks, taper context, and weekly load targets should use the annual training plan summary instead of manually listing raw calendar events.

cases.prompt: What weekly TSS or load targets are already planned for my next base and build blocks, including any recovery weeks?
cases.notes: ATP positive: existing planned weekly targets and recovery weeks are summarized by get_annual_training_plan, not reconstructed from get_events in chat.

cases.prompt: Summarize my periodization from the calendar notes and plan targets: base, build, recovery, and taper phases with projection-ready weekly targets.
cases.notes: ATP positive: explicit periodization summary and projection-ready weekly_plan_targets should route first to the ATP tool.

cases.prompt: List the calendar events and notes on my intervals calendar between 2026-06-01 and 2026-06-14 so I can inspect the raw entries myself.
cases.notes: Contrast: raw calendar listing with explicit date window should choose get_events even though ATP, training-plan, and projection tools are available.

cases.prompt: Which training plan is currently assigned to me, and what plan metadata or assigned dates does Intervals have for it?
cases.notes: Contrast: asking for the assigned training-plan object or template metadata should route to get_training_plan, not the ATP calendar summary.

cases.prompt: Project my CTL, ATL, and TSB through 2026-09-01 using my planned weekly targets to see if the load ramp is sustainable.
cases.notes: Contrast: explicit future fitness projection should choose get_fitness_projection rather than summarizing ATP phases first.

cases.prompt: Plan tomorrow's workout around my current calendar and fitness. Resolve tomorrow in my athlete timezone before using any date, then use that resolved date for the plan.
cases.notes: Relative future planning must start by resolving athlete-local tomorrow via resolve_calendar_dates; do not compute tomorrow from model, UTC, or client-local time.

cases.prompt: What should I do next Friday? First resolve the next Friday date in my athlete-local timezone, then inspect any planned events for that date.
cases.notes: Future weekday prompts are ambiguous without the athlete-local calendar anchor and should call resolve_calendar_dates before get_events or planning tools.

cases.prompt: I race in 12 days; resolve the athlete-local race date first, verify the weekday, then summarize the taper window.
cases.notes: Countdown planning should use resolve_calendar_dates output as the anchor instead of model arithmetic or UTC/client-time date math.
